title: Career Progression
subtitle: A timeline of jobs, academics, certifications, and notes

Notes.raw: First real job making a lot of money, worked it throughout the summer and then kept working during the school year. I made a lot of money in tips as well but those aren't noted here since I did not record them at the time. I picked up a lot of shifts as well and worked into school working 7am-11pm Sat-Sun and sometimes picking up the 3pm-11pm on Friday's as well. If you include the tips I made, I think it was quite good money for a college student (College Freshman Year (Fall+), 1st-2nd Year) Freshman in terms of degree progress but I'm a year behind. Note that in the following notes. The year's correlate correctly, and have two for the spring->fall. Started college in 2021

Notes.raw: Continued working for CIVITAS into the spring semester to try to make some money, but it wasn't much honestly. I got a much higher paying job at Consigli, where I worked for the summer, but no overtime could be made. Working again for CIVITAS in the fall semester but only 4hr/week so nothing substantial. For BarBak I get $100 for new accounts that I sign on that do at least $1000 in sales and 3% for any orders they make. BarBak canelled hourly and gave me the option to leave or do commission only; it wasn't worth it so I just left. (College Junior Year, 3rd-4th Year)

Notes.raw: Continued working for CIVITAS into the fall semester to make a little bit of money. Also worked weekends (sat-sun) at Tiger Sguar and then I did HU-ILEAD for the spring semester. Secured a summer internship at Ryan late last year. CIVITAS gave me a $500 bonus listed on my last paycheck too which was nice. Quit the boba job when summer started and took about a week off from Ryan to hike with friends. Also had one of my paychecks at tiger sugar sent over through zelle. Also for some reason my last paycheck at tiger sugar was $17.50/hr instead of $14. Randomly got the first week of SYEP pay, so made $200 while doing nothing. Working at Ryan is terrible and I definitely can see myself at CIVITAS; there's just so much time I'm spend doing nothing and I don't really fit in here.I ended up choosing CIVITAS for the full time offer.

Notes.raw: Continued working for CIVITAS into the fall semester to make a little bit of money. Also worked weekends (sat-sun) at Tiger Sguar and then I did HU-ILEAD for the spring semester. Secured a summer internship at Ryan late last year. CIVITAS gave me a $500 bonus listed on my last paycheck too which was nice. Quit the boba job when summer started and took about a week off from Ryan to hike with friends. Also had one of my paychecks at tiger sugar sent over through zelle. Also for some reason my last paycheck at tiger sugar was $17.50/hr instead of $14. Randomly got the first week of SYEP pay, so made $200 while doing nothing. Working at Ryan is terrible and I definitely can see myself at CIVITAS; there's just so much time I'm doing nothing here and I don't really fit in here.
